nodes.context: Mafia-type criminal organization from Apulia, Italy, active in Brindisi, Lecce, Taranto.
Calabrian mafia organization; influenced SCU's structure and rituals.
Camorra organization led by Raffaele Cutolo; preceded SCU in Apulia.
Campanian mafia organization; has links to SCU via Di Lauro clan.
Criminal groups from Albania; collaborate with SCU in smuggling.
Criminal organization from Foggia; emerged from internal SCU divisions.
Antagonistic criminal group from Lecce, independent from SCU.
Criminal group formed in 1986; fought a feud against SCU's clans in Lecce.
Criminal group formed in 1990 from internal division in SCU.
Camorra clan; has links to SCU regarding drug trafficking.
'Ndrangheta clan; founder Umberto Bellocco endorsed SCU activities.
'Ndrangheta clan; involved in operation Galassia with SCU.
'Ndrangheta clan; involved in operation Galassia with SCU.
'Ndrangheta clan; possibly involved in operation Galassia with SCU.
Camorra clan; allied with Società foggiana in drug trafficking.
Criminal organization from Serbia; listed as ally in infobox.
Criminal organization from Montenegro; listed as ally in infobox.
Criminal organization from Corsica; listed as ally in infobox.
Criminal organization from Romania; listed as ally in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 'Ndrangheta, Camorra, Società foggiana, Albanian mafia, Serbian mafia, Montenegrin mafia, Corsican mafia, Romanian Mafia
edges.context: Infobox lists 'Ndrangheta as an ally of Sacra Corona Unita.

edges.evidence_quote: The Sacra Corona Unita was created to counter the overwhelming power in the prisons and on the Apulian territory of some of the more established mafia organisations, such as the Campania families united in Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.context: SCU was created to counter the power of Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

edges.evidence_quote: Nuova Famiglia Salentina : formed in 1986 by De Matteis Pantaleo, from Lecce and stemming from the Famiglia Salentina Libera born in the early 1980s as an autonomous criminal movement in the Salento area with no links with extra-regional Mafia expressions, the organization fought a feud against SCU's clans in Lecce;
edges.context: Nuova Famiglia Salentina fought a feud against SCU's clans in Lecce.

edges.evidence_quote: Rosa dei Venti : formed in 1990 by De Tommasi in the Lecce prison, following an internal division in the SCU.
edges.context: Rosa dei Venti formed from an internal division in SCU.

edges.evidence_quote: The murder of Giuseppe Laviano, lieutenant of the Sacra Corona Unita in Foggia (whose body was never found), in January 1989, marked a turning point in the mafia war and the rise of Rocco Moretti, known as il porco (the pig), in the context of the Foggia organized crime at the expense of Laviano himself. After the murder, Moretti became the head of the new criminal organization Società foggiana in Foggia.
edges.context: Società foggiana emerged after the murder of an SCU lieutenant, indicating a split or rivalry.

edges.evidence_quote: The criminal activities of the criminal association would always have been endorsed by the 'Ndrangheta boss Umberto Bellocco who, after 21 years in prison, would have met the Sacra Corona Unita member Cataldo Caporosso and conferred on him the dowry of padrino.
edges.context: Bellocco 'ndrina boss endorsed SCU activities and conferred a dowry on an SCU member.

edges.evidence_quote: However, according to the pentito Antonio Accurso, the Camorra's Di Lauro clan has several links to the Sacra Corona Unita in question with regards to drug trafficking.
edges.context: Di Lauro clan has links to SCU regarding drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: The Albanian mafia collaborates with the SCU to make Albania a sorting centre for large amounts of smuggled cigarettes, and drugs from Afghanistan , much of which enter Italy through the coasts of Montenegro, Croatia and Albania.
edges.context: Albanian mafia collaborates with SCU in smuggling cigarettes and drugs.

edges.evidence_quote: Remo Lecce Libera : formed by some leading criminal figures from Lecce, who claim to be independent from any criminal group other than the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.context: Remo Lecce Libera is an antagonistic group independent from SCU.

edges.evidence_quote: The relations between the Foggia delinquency and the Camorra are probably the oldest and deepest ones. The Foggia delinquency has managed to make the qualitative leap thanks to the Camorra, particularly the Nuova Camorra Organizzata ;
edges.context: Società foggiana has deep relations with Camorra, particularly Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

edges.evidence_quote: In September 2019, the Italian police dismantled an international drug trafficking alliance between the powerful Gionta clan of the Camorra, the Società Foggiana, and Moroccan drug traffickers.
edges.context: Società foggiana was part of a drug trafficking alliance with Gionta clan.
